title: Cape Verde shock Spain with historic draw on World Cup debut
description: The African minnows Cape Verde, on their World Cup debut, claimed a famous point as they held the favourites Spain to a 0-0 draw
content:
Wow, just wow. At 1.57pm, Atlanta time, 3,291 miles from home, the final whistle went on Cape Verde’s first ever World Cup game, and they had only gone and done it.
What they had done was madness: a tiny nation, a debutant, had held one of the favour... [4339 chars]

title: US Air Force B-52 bomber plane crashes after take off in California
description: Officials did not say if anyone was injured in the crash, but the aircraft typically carry a crew of five.
content:
A US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber plane has "crashed shortly after take off" from Edwards Air Force Base in southern California, the base said in a statement.
The incident occurred at 11:20 local time (19:20 GMT). The base did not say whether... [1571 chars]

title: Defence secretary quizzed by MPs over timing of Russian oil tanker seizure
description: Dan Jarvis says vessel tracked for several days as opposition suggest decision linked to his predecessor’s resignation
content:
Dan Jarvis has told MPs that the Russian oil tanker seized on Sunday had been monitored for several days as he deflected suggestions that its seizure had been ordered by a prime minister under pressure after the resignation of John Healey last week.

title: UK ministers lobby Trump to avert backlash against social media ban
description: No 10 is worried about retaliation from White House over restrictions to under-16s’ internet use
content:
Ministers have embarked on a concerted lobbying operation to prevent a backlash from the Trump administration to the under-16s social media ban announced by Keir Starmer.
